home.meta_description: Norwegian-led development studio in Croatia. Web apps, mobile apps, AI-powered products, and team augmentation without Oslo premiums.
home.hero_img_alt: Scandinavian coastal city at night, cold blue light on dark water under a starry sky
home.hero_body: Norwegian-led, EU-based studio: web, mobile, and AI — senior-level delivery without the Oslo price tag. Clear milestones, weekly updates, code you own.
home.bento_opera_alt: Oslo Opera House and waterfront at night, lights reflecting on the fjord
home.bento_guide_body: Not a faceless shop — we speak your context and ship from Croatia: senior work at about 40–60% below typical Norwegian agency rates, GDPR-aligned, same timezone.
home.bento_ai_body: Agents, n8n, and backends that save time — not slide decks.
home.bento_web_body: React, Next.js, Astro, React Native — landing pages to full products.
home.bento_outsourced_body: Need more than one hire? We lead the project, coordinate EU developers, and keep communication plain — fixed milestones, no surprises.

blog.empty_post: documents in Sanity Studio, then run a production deploy (or connect a webhook to your host).
blog.digest_body: No fluff. No spam. Just technical excellence and occasional philosophical rants delivered monthly.

contact.meta_description: Get in touch with digiDEVS — Norwegian-led development, web and mobile apps, and AI-powered products.
contact.hero_blurb: Whether you need a dedicated team or a technical partner, we're ready to bridge the gap between Nordic precision and Mediterranean craft.
contact.form_success: Thanks — your message was sent. We will get back to you soon.
contact.form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
contact.form_rate_limited: Too many messages from this connection. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

about.meta_description: Who we are: Norwegian-led precision, EU delivery standards, and a distributed team across Oslo and Croatia.
about.label: About
about.intro: We combine Norwegian technical leadership with a senior engineering team in Croatia — so you get clarity, velocity, and EU-grade delivery without the capital-city price tag.
about.card1_body: Web apps, mobile, AI integration, and team augmentation — stack, ways of working, and how we ship.
about.card2_body: Senior-level craft, EU expectations, GDPR-aware development, and transparent Norwegian-led communication.

competence.meta_description: What we build and how: AI integration, senior talent, Norwegian-led management, and a modern stack.
competence.heading: Competence
competence.intro: Our DNA is built on Norwegian-led precision and global engineering talent. We don't just write code; we architect resilient digital ecosystems.
competence.ai_body: Moving beyond simple API calls. We implement custom LLM orchestration, vector databases for RAG architectures, and predictive analytics that integrate seamlessly into existing enterprise workflows.
competence.team_body: Every project is led by developers with over 10 years of experience in high-traffic environments.
competence.legacy_body: We bring the clinical precision of Scandinavian project management to every engagement. Transparency, punctuality, and uncompromising quality are the baselines of our operations.
competence.stack_body: We build with technologies designed for the future: Rust, TypeScript, and distributed systems architecture.
competence.step1_body: We prioritize scalability and modularity. Before the first line of code is written, our senior architects map out data flows and system dependencies to prevent future technical debt.
competence.step2_body: Security isn't a feature; it's a foundation. From SOC2 compliance pathways to end-to-end encryption, we ensure your data is as resilient as the code that manages it.
competence.step3_body: We maintain a dedicated R&D wing that tests emerging AI frameworks and infrastructure patterns, ensuring the competence we offer is always on the bleeding edge.

quality.meta_description: Norwegian precision, EU standards, GDPR-aware delivery, and boutique craftsmanship — without the Oslo markup.
quality.label: Boutique Engineering
quality.heading: Quality
quality.intro: We operate at the intersection of Northern precision and Mediterranean artistry, delivering digital products that exceed European standards without the prohibitive capital city premiums.
quality.hero_caption: EST. 2024 in Split - for Norwegian projects
quality.nordic_body: Our DNA is rooted in the rigorous standards of Scandinavian engineering. We prioritize structural integrity, clean code architecture, and a "function first" philosophy that ensures long-term scalability.
quality.eu_body: Fully compliant with GDPR and European accessibility guidelines (WCAG 2.1). We build for the global market from within the Union.
quality.craft_body: Digital soul forged in the Mediterranean. We bring a high-end boutique aesthetic and meticulous attention to UI detail, ensuring every interaction feels intentional.
quality.craft_img_alt: Close-up of textured, interlocking stone tiles with a warm spotlight effect, showcasing artisan craftsmanship.
quality.premium_body: We leverage the efficiency of a distributed boutique model. You get the executive-level quality of a high-end Oslo agency, delivered with the cost-agility of a leaner, borderless team.
quality.protocol_intro: Our methodology is a closed-loop system of refinement.
quality.q1_body: Every line of code undergoes a peer-review process based on Norwegian engineering benchmarks.
quality.q2_body: UI components are tested across 12 different viewport scales to ensure responsiveness is absolute.
quality.q3_body: Mandatory WCAG 2.1 compliance check for color contrast, screen readers, and keyboard navigation.
quality.q4_body: Optimization protocol targeting sub-2s load times on mobile networks to minimize bounce rates.
quality.balance_body: Ready to elevate your digital presence with European precision and craftsmanship? Let's discuss your next project.

layout.default_description: Norwegian-led development studio. Web apps, mobile apps, and AI-powered products — EU quality without the Oslo price tag.
